statement.markdown: Implement a function `removeTrailingWhitespaces` that removes all trailing whitespaces from the given string. The function should handle both spaces and tabs.
statement.inputFormat: A string containing any combination of characters including spaces, tabs, and other printable characters.
statement.outputFormat: The input string with all trailing spaces and tabs removed.
statement.notes: Note that this problem does not require handling of leading whitespaces.

hints.text: Use the `strip()` method to remove leading and trailing whitespaces
Remember to handle tabs in addition to spaces

editorial.title: Optimal Solution for String Trailing Whitespaces
editorial.intuition: The optimal solution uses the built-in `strip()` method which removes leading and trailing whitespaces.
editorial.bruteForce: A brute force approach would involve iterating over the string from the end and checking each character manually.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use the `strip()` method to remove leading and trailing whitespaces in one step.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The `strip()` method removes all whitespace characters (including spaces and tabs) from the start and end of the string.
editorial.dryRun: Here is an example input/output pair: Input: Hello   World! Output: Hello World!

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: string removeTrailingWhitespaces(string str) { // TODO: implement } };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public String removeTrailingWhitespaces(String str) { // TODO: implement return null; } }
starterCode.python: class Solution: def removeTrailingWhitespaces(self, str): # TODO: implement pass

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: string removeTrailingWhitespaces(string str) { while (str[str.size()-1] == ' ') { str.pop_back(); } return str; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public String removeTrailingWhitespaces(String str) { while (str.length()-1 >= 0 && str.charAt(str.length()-1) == ' ') { str = str.substring(0, str.length()-1); } return str; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def removeTrailingWhitespaces(self, str): while str.endswith(' '): str = str[:-1]; return str
buggyStarterCode.javascript: function removeTrailingWhitespaces(str) { while (str.length > 0 && str.endsWith(' ')) { str = str.substring(0, str.length-1); } return str; }

solutions.python: class Solution: def removeTrailingWhitespaces(self, str: str) -> str: return str.rstrip()

testCases.input:
5
Hello   World! This is a test
testCases.output: Hello World! This is a test
